parsed_review.summary: CP00-810 descriptor-only synthetic-fixture-to-failure-recovery bridge pack (risk C, 150 units) verified by read-only source inspection. Binding, requirements, section rows, descriptor, validators, tests, contract, live plan, README, index, and validate-script all reconcile exactly with the prompt baseline; clean non-overlapping continuation from CP809. No-write/no-real-data/runtime-closed boundaries enforced at attestation, row, validator, test, and persisted-contract layers. Claude is read-only/non-final; Hermes is descriptor-only evidence, not product runtime. No over-claim (production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false). Review inputs are valid hardened evidence. No P0/P1/P2; one non-blocking P3 for expected pre-closeout absence of downstream artifacts/validation-command runs (mirrors CP809). PASS_WITH_FINDINGS; does not block pack or this CP's closeout goal.

findings.title: Downstream closeout artifacts and validation-command evidence not yet present (expected at the Claude-review stage)
findings.details: manifest.required_pack_artifacts (lines 1627-1633) lists command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, but Glob of docs/closeout-packs/cp00-810/ confirms only manifest.json currently exists, and the artifacts dir has no raw-output.json/review-receipt.json yet. pack_level_claude_review.status=review_pending with valid_review_receipts=[] (manifest:1622-1625). This is the expected state during the Claude review step: claude-review-result.json wraps this review's verdict and adjudication.md is generated from the review receipt, so neither can exist before this review; command-evidence.json and construction-inspection.json plus execution of the listed validation commands (npm run closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, npm test, validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check) are produced/run by the closeout pipeline after this review. Being read-only, I verified the binding (registry.js:426), requirements/rows (registry.js:1969,683-743,2014-2036), descriptor and no-write/authority boundaries (service.js:1606,285,61), validators (validators.js:134,170,723,727,741), tests (model.test.js:948-1021), contract promotion/projection/validation.valid (contract:55,71,30799,33581,43037), live plan entry (closeout-pack-plan.json:398), README (#cp00-810), and index re-exports by source inspection only; I did not and cannot execute commands or confirm downstream adjudication/inspection. No defect in the pack's current claims was found - the manifest correctly reports production_ready=false / runtime_ready=false / in_progress and does not overclaim. This mirrors the equivalent non-blocking P3 recorded for CP00-809.
findings.recommendation: Proceed with the normal closeout pipeline: run the listed validation commands, capture command-evidence.json, and generate claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json; then obtain human final approval before any runtime or enterprise-trust opening (deferred to CP00-811 / RP26.P07.M02.S03). No code change required for this pack.
